# VaultSpark Football GM

VaultSpark Football GM is a proprietary browser franchise simulator by VaultSpark Studios LLC.

Canonical URL: https://vaultsparkstudios.com/vaultspark-football-gm/
Contact: footballgm@vaultsparkstudios.com
Rights: Proprietary - All Rights Reserved, VaultSpark Studios LLC.

Useful paths:
- /vaultspark-football-gm/ - browser game
- /vaultspark-football-gm/contact.html - project contact
- /vaultspark-football-gm/privacy.html - privacy notice
- /vaultspark-football-gm/terms.html - terms and rights notice
- /vaultspark-football-gm/agents.json - machine-readable agent metadata
